REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (322 Faxon Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Thomas Lucas.

The sale was confirmed at $535,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed October 19, 2012. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $563,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Authority To List And Sell Trust'S Real Property And To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement With Real Estate Broker
Off Calendar May-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Petitioner/Trustee.

The Court granted the Petition for Authority To List and Sell Trust's Real Property and To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement With Real Estate Broker (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
